step_0.prompt: Has the dryer already been paid and has the cycle started?

pay_help.prompt: Please complete the payment at the central unit and select the dryer number to start the cycle.

problem_check.prompt: What do you see exactly on the display?

door_issue.prompt: It looks like a door issue. Please check that no clothes are stuck in the seal and close the door firmly until you hear a click.

ready_state.prompt: The dryer is ready. Please select the program and start the cycle.

credit_issue.prompt: Please make sure the payment is completed and start the dryer.

alarm_state.prompt: Please tell me the alarm code shown on the display.

alarm_resolution.prompt: If the alarm matches a documented case, follow the corresponding reset instructions. If the code is not documented or it appears again, the case needs manual review.

retry_flow.prompt: Please try again selecting the dryer and starting the cycle. If it still does not work, use another dryer.

fallback.prompt: Please use another dryer. The case will be reviewed manually by an operator.

end_success.prompt: Perfect, the dryer is now working correctly.

step_0.prompt: What problem are you experiencing with the dryer?

soaking_wet.prompt: Very wet clothes usually mean the washer did not spin correctly. Please wash the clothes again separating the load into two machines. A new payment is required. If needed, the case can be reviewed manually after the rewash.

normal_damp.prompt: If clothes are still damp, make sure the load is not too large and distribute the clothes well. You can add more drying time.

alarm_case.prompt: Please tell me the alarm code shown on the display.

alarm_action.prompt: If the alarm matches a documented case, follow the corresponding reset instructions. If the code is not documented or it appears again, the case needs manual review.

damage_burnt.prompt: Burnt clothes usually happen when the temperature is not appropriate. Please follow garment instructions. The case can be reviewed manually, but compensation is not automatic.

damage_plastic.prompt: Plastic stuck to clothes may happen if the drum was not checked before use. The case can be reviewed manually, but compensation is not automatic.

damage_stained.prompt: Stains may come from the drum condition. Please wash the clothes again with pre-treatment. If needed, the case can be reviewed manually.

generic_case.prompt: Please try again with a smaller and well distributed load. If the problem continues, use another dryer.

fallback.prompt: Please use another dryer. The case will be reviewed.
